name: text-to-cad
description: An open source harness for generating CAD models

name: future-agi
description: Open-source, end-to-end platform for evaluating, observing, and improving LLM and AI agent applications. Tracing · Evals · Simulations · Datasets · Gateway · Guardrails. Self-hostable. Apache 2.0.

name: stash
description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.

name: intro-agentic-ai
description: 认识 Agentic AI：从神经网络到智能体

name: ai-auto-work
description: Automatically completes the full workflow from requirement research → research review → planning → plan review → development →  development review using → test AI large language models. Capable of autonomously handling medium to large-scale engineering projects.

name: VizPilot_AI
description: 上传数据，智能推荐图表，一键生成交互式可视化。 Upload data, get chart recommendations, and generate interactive visualizations in one click.

name: LLM-Prompt-Orchestration-Engine
description: High-performance prompt engineering framework. Features template versioning, variable injection, context optimization, and automated pipeline integration for LLM-driven applications.

name: Neural-Vision-Cleanup-Suite
description: Advanced computer vision framework for generative media restoration and artifact removal. Optimized for high-fidelity image cleanup, inpainting, and visual noise reduction using deep learning architectures.

name: kimiflare
description: Moonshot's open-weight Kimi running on your own Cloudflare account. No middleman.

name: claude-comstyle
description: 13 prompts to control how Claude communicates — choose your style, cut the noise.
